header: Gerente de Excelência Comercial — Sanofi Medley

lesson.menu_desc: We Have Done It: Present Perfect -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 15 -- Sharing Good News -- Present Perfect
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Gleice Leonardo Rocha de Souza | Aula 15 -- Sharing Good News

listenings.text: Hi, this is David from Sanofi Medley. I have great news for the team. This year we have reached our sales target, and we have launched two new products. We have also signed a big partnership with a new pharmacy chain. Our team has worked very hard, and the results are excellent. Next week, you will share this good news with the customer. Please prepare three sentences with the present perfect. For example, we have grown a lot, and we have achieved our main goal. I am very proud of everyone. Thank you, and congratulations to the whole team.

Hello, my name is Sofia, and I work in marketing. Today I want to share some good news about our year. We have achieved a very important milestone. We have sold more than one million units, and we have reached every sales target. Our company has grown thirty percent, and the results are the best in five years. We have also won a national award for the new product. I am very proud of this success. These are big achievements, and we have done it together as a team. Congratulations to everyone, and thank you for your hard work.

extra_audio.text: First, Gleice says she has good news to share. Then she announces the main result: the team has reached the sales target. After that, she gives another achievement: they have launched two new products. Next, she shares the milestone: they have signed a big partnership. Finally, she says she is very proud and thanks the team for the success.
